/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/lib/schedule.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/_determinismtest_c_main.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/_sourcea.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/_sourceb.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/_adder.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/DeterminismTest_C.dir/DeterminismTest_C.c.o -o DeterminismTest_C  -lm core/libreactor-c.a core/liblf-low-level-platform-impl.a core/liblf-platform-impl.a
